title: Putting in Variable For Month Names
excerpt:
I’m not sure if this is the proper place for this question or if it’s a possible feature, but I thought I would ask to be certain. 
I’m trying to automate a new group be created on the first of every month, which is easi…

posts.author: acard (Alice C)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m not sure if this is the proper place for this question or if it’s a possible feature, but I thought I would ask to be certain.

I’m trying to automate a new group be created on the first of every month, which is easily done. I want the group to be named “New Clients [name of current month],” and I wanted to know if there was a way to put a variable in there to do that. Sort of like how if you notify someone of something you can say, “Hey, check out this notification about {item.name}!” but with “New Clients {current.month} 2020” or something.

Is this a possible feature for this automation, does anyone know?

Thank you!

posts.author: melissav-monday.com (Melissa - monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @acard! Great question At this time, the group name is a static field and there is not a way to pull in variables. You can set up the automation with the templated name, but the month would need to be entered manually once the group has been created.
